features: Card Protector: The RFID protection card holder can perfectly block unwanted RFID scanners, includes RFID blocking technology to prevent unauthorized access to personal information, designed to block RFID readers from scanning your credit cards, debit cards, banking information, smartcards, RFID driver's licenses and other RFID cards.

Lightweight: It easy to carry in your pocket or purse more easily than a money clip, to protect your card from physical damage, credit card cases are small enough to keep hidden in your front pocket or purse, offering you the perfect solution.
Shiny But Sturdy: Using high quality aluminum materials from top manufacturer, it is constructed by strong metal and plastic.
Multiple Cards Supported: 6 slots to put in cards. Designed to hold different sort of cards, fits various types of cards: id card, credit card, driver's licenses, medical cards, etc.
Hight Quality: Our credit card cases have been independently tested and approved to protect you from electronic pickpocketing, perfect gift/present for birthday/Christmas/New Year.
